The classification of Sciodaphyllum verticillatum includes its genus, Sciodaphyllum, which is part of the larger order of Apiales. Further classification includes its family, Araliaceae, and its kingdom, Plantae. Sciodaphyllum verticillatum is also known to be a part of the larger group of flowering plants, angiosperms.
